subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Karím! Upon thee be My Glory! The fragrances of thy love are diffused abroad and thy steadfastness in the Cause of God is manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الکریم علیک بهائی نفحات حبت متضوع و استقامتت در امر الله مشهود سوف
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
